title: coleus batesii
intro: Coleus batesii is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly known for its medicinal and ornamental uses. Traditionally, the plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coleus batesii include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, and is also used to make essential oils and extracts.
